title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: Softr is a no-code platform featuring an AI Co-Builder that generates role-based access control, database structures, and workflow automations for building event management systems and internal tools. The video demonstrates building a complete app with roles, permissions, and automations without multiple AI prompts.
